# About
**Cryptic Foes** is a mod that makes your minecraft experience more interesting & challenging by adding new enemies to your world. New dungeons and bosses are also planned for the future

# Features

<details>
<summary>Howler</summary>

  **Howlers** are peculiar cave dwellers, who can be found in caves below 0 by y. Howlers can be seen sleeping on cave ceilings and won't hurt you, unless you disturb their precious sleep.
- Howlers can use their powerful scream to stun everything on their way
- "Stunned" effect prevents target from every action, but disappears if target gets damaged
- Howler drops its membranes
![Howler and items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15f0458403a72fe995935733936a2328eba4da3b.png)
- Cave salad is a new food item with some "interesting" side effect
- Monstrous horn can be used to create the same powerful screams as howler
- Silencing blend can be used on any block to remove its sounds
- Screamer is a new redstone block that knock backs mobs




![Howlers in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/042b9cfbc9f98943f13c1075575d309412ffb02c_0.webp)
</details>

# For Modpack Creators
You are free to use our mod in your modpacks. 
However, if you're making a **paid** modpack, you'll need to **ask** us first.
